response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but their profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. Their professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. Database experience centers on MongoDB and MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and there is no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain exposure — RIDE Capital was retail investment fintech, not investment banking. The systems-programming depth in DLang is interesting but not a substitute for the specific stack and domain this consulting engagement demands.
strengths: Deep low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput services at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
Broad polyglot background with some C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI) and CI/CD tooling
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets / investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering and low-latency systems skills
